nasb.text: Put in the sickle, for the harvest is ripe. Come, tread, for the wine press is full; The vats overflow, for their wickedness is great.

esv.text: Put in the sickle, for the harvest is ripe. Go in, tread, for the winepress is full. The vats overflow, for their evil is great.

cnv.text: 你們要伸出鐮刀， 因為莊稼已經熟了。 來踐踏吧， 因為壓酒池滿了， 酒池盈溢， 因為他們的罪惡極大。

ccb.text: 开镰吧，因为庄稼熟了； 踩踏吧，因为榨酒池的葡萄满了。 他们恶贯满盈，如酒池满溢。”
